ESP32-S3 Series Datasheet
=========================

1. Overview

ESP32-S3 is a dual-core XTensa LX7 microcontroller with integrated Wi-Fi (802.11 b/g/n)
and Bluetooth 5 (LE) connectivity. It is designed for AIoT applications requiring
on-device neural network acceleration and secure connectivity.

2. CPU and Memory

Processor:
- Xtensa dual-core 32-bit LX7 microprocessor @ up to 240 MHz
- Ultra-low-power co-processor (ULP-RISC-V)

On-chip Memory:
- 512 KB SRAM (internal) at base address 0x3FC88000
- 16 KB RTC SRAM at base address 0x50000000
- 384 KB ROM

External Memory:
- SPI Flash: up to 16 MB (Octal SPI / QPI supported)
- PSRAM: up to 8 MB (Octal SPI)

3. Neural Network Acceleration

- Xtensa AI extension instructions (vector acceleration)
- Accelerated operations: convolution, pooling, activation
- No dedicated NPU — uses CPU vector extensions
- Target performance: ~50 GOPS (8-bit MAC operations)

4. Wireless

- Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n (2.4 GHz)
- Bluetooth 5 (LE): long range, 2Mbps
- Bluetooth Mesh support

5. Peripheral Interfaces

- 2 × I2C
- 4 × SPI (including 1 Octal SPI for Flash/PSRAM)
- 3 × UART
- 2 × I2S
- 1 × LCD interface (Intel 8080 / RGB565 / RGB888)
- 1 × Camera interface (DVP 8/16-bit)
- 2 × USB-OTG 1.1 (Full Speed, 12 Mbps)
- 14 × touch sensor channels
- 2 × 12-bit SAR ADC (20 channels total)
- 8 × PWM channels (LEDC)
- 1 × TWAI (CAN 2.0 compatible)
- 1 × SDIO host/slave 3.0
- Up to 45 × GPIO

6. Security

- AES-128/256 hardware acceleration
- SHA hardware acceleration
- RSA-3072 hardware acceleration
- Secure boot V2
- Flash encryption
- Digital signature peripheral

7. Camera & Display

- DVP camera interface: supports OV2640, OV7670 sensors
- SPI/8080 LCD: up to 320×240 typical
- RGB LCD interface: up to 800×480

8. Audio

- 2 × I2S interfaces for audio codec connection
- PDM microphone input
- DAC: 2× 8-bit channels

9. Power Management

- Multiple power modes: active, modem-sleep, light-sleep, deep-sleep
- Deep sleep current: ~7 µA
- RTC domain always-on

Package Options:
- QFN56: 7mm × 7mm
- Modules: ESP32-S3-WROOM-1/2, ESP32-S3-MINI-1

Operating Temperature: -40°C to +105°C
Supply Voltage: 3.0V – 3.6V
